findings.title: Redis port open to internet
findings.description: Security group sg-prod-redis allows inbound traffic from 0.0.0.0/0 on port 6379 (Redis). Database and cache ports must be restricted to VPC CIDR only.

findings.title: ElastiCache cluster without encryption at rest
findings.description: ElastiCache cluster cache-prod-legacy does not have encryption at rest enabled. All cache clusters must be encrypted to protect data at rest.

findings.title: SSH port open to internet
findings.description: Security group sg-web-servers allows inbound traffic from 0.0.0.0/0 on port 22 (SSH). SSH access must be restricted to VPC CIDR only.

findings.title: EBS volume without encryption at rest
findings.description: EBS volume vol-data-001 does not have encryption at rest enabled. All block storage must be encrypted to protect data at rest.
